raw_asr_text: call getUserProfile with the userId parameter
literal_reference: call getUserProfile with the userId parameter
final_expected_text: call getUserProfile with the userId parameter
notes: camelCase identifiers must survive unchanged through all stages

raw_asr_text: the endpoint is https://api.example.com/v2/users/me
literal_reference: the endpoint is https://api.example.com/v2/users/me
notes: URL must survive; any mutation is a hard failure (malformedURL or protectedTermMissing)

raw_asr_text: send the report to uh alice dot smith at company dot io
literal_reference: send the report to alice.smith@company.io
notes: spoken email address must be assembled correctly; any corruption is a hard failure

raw_asr_text: upgrade to version 3.14.1 of the SDK
literal_reference: upgrade to version 3.14.1 of the SDK
final_expected_text: upgrade to version 3.14.1 of the SDK
notes: semver must survive exactly; numericCorruption would misguide a developer

raw_asr_text: the config file is at slash usr slash local slash bin slash config dot yaml
literal_reference: the config file is at /usr/local/bin/config.yaml
notes: spoken file path reconstruction

raw_asr_text: the variable name is user underscore profile underscore id
literal_reference: the variable name is user_profile_id
notes: spoken snake_case reconstruction

raw_asr_text: install the package at npm install at scope slash mypackage version 2.1.0
literal_reference: install the package at npm install @scope/mypackage@2.1.0
notes: npm package name with scope and version

raw_asr_text: the REST API returns a JSON response over HTTPS
literal_reference: the REST API returns a JSON response over HTTPS
final_expected_text: the REST API returns a JSON response over HTTPS
notes: multiple acronyms in one sentence; all must survive case-sensitively

raw_asr_text: set the AWS region to eu dash west dash 1
literal_reference: set the AWS region to eu-west-1
final_expected_text: set the AWS region to eu-west-1
notes: AWS region identifier; dash must not become a minus sign or be dropped

raw_asr_text: uh the function is called calculateTotalPrice and it takes a uh priceList parameter
literal_reference: the function is called calculateTotalPrice and it takes a priceList parameter
final_expected_text: the function is called calculateTotalPrice and it takes a priceList parameter
notes: filler removal must not damage camelCase identifiers adjacent to uh

raw_asr_text: the PR is at github dot com slash myorg slash myrepo slash pull slash 42
literal_reference: the PR is at github.com/myorg/myrepo/pull/42
notes: spoken URL with number at end; number must not be mutated

raw_asr_text: run pytest tests slash unit dash dash verbose
literal_reference: run pytest tests/unit --verbose
notes: CLI command reconstruction; double-dash flags must survive

raw_asr_text: the SHA is abc123def456
literal_reference: the SHA is abc123def456
notes: git SHA; any reformatting or splitting would be a hard failure

raw_asr_text: I updated the iOS app to Swift 5.9 targeting iOS 17
literal_reference: I updated the iOS app to Swift 5.9 targeting iOS 17
final_expected_text: I updated the iOS app to Swift 5.9 targeting iOS 17
notes: product names with version numbers; iOS must not become Ios or IOS

raw_asr_text: the GraphQL mutation is createUser with email and displayName
literal_reference: the GraphQL mutation is createUser with email and displayName
final_expected_text: the GraphQL mutation is createUser with email and displayName
notes: mixed identifier styles in one sentence

raw_asr_text: regex pattern is backslash d plus dot backslash d plus
literal_reference: regex pattern is \d+.\d+
notes: spoken backslash and regex metacharacters — must not be consumed by formatting

raw_asr_text: the build failed on line 247 with error E2003
literal_reference: the build failed on line 247 with error E2003
final_expected_text: the build failed on line 247 with error E2003
notes: numeric error codes must survive as-is; numericCorruption would misdirect debugging

raw_asr_text: uh uh the API key is stored in env var APP underscore SECRET underscore KEY
literal_reference: the API key is stored in env var APP_SECRET_KEY
final_expected_text: the API key is stored in env var APP_SECRET_KEY
notes: screaming snake_case env var; disfluency removal must not touch the identifier

raw_asr_text: deploy to production using docker-compose dot yml
literal_reference: deploy to production using docker-compose.yml
notes: hyphenated filename with extension; must not be split or altered

raw_asr_text: the timeout is set to 30000 milliseconds
literal_reference: the timeout is set to 30000 milliseconds
final_expected_text: the timeout is set to 30000 milliseconds
acceptable_variants: the timeout is set to 30,000 milliseconds
notes: large numbers; acceptable variant allows thousand-separator formatting

raw_asr_text: use the XCTest framework with @MainActor
literal_reference: use the XCTest framework with @MainActor
notes: Swift attribute syntax; @ prefix must not be dropped

raw_asr_text: the response code was 503 Service Unavailable
literal_reference: the response code was 503 Service Unavailable
final_expected_text: the response code was 503 Service Unavailable
notes: HTTP status code; number must be preserved exactly

raw_asr_text: the model accuracy was 94.7 percent
literal_reference: the model accuracy was 94.7 percent
notes: decimal number must not be rounded or dropped; acceptable variant allows % symbol

raw_asr_text: check the repo at git at github dot com colon myorg slash repo dot git
literal_reference: check the repo at git@github.com:myorg/repo.git
notes: SSH git remote URL with @ and colon syntax

raw_asr_text: in Python the function is decorated with at app dot route slash api slash v1
literal_reference: in Python the function is decorated with @app.route('/api/v1')
final_expected_text: in Python the function is decorated with @app.route('/api/v1')
notes: Flask route decorator; both the decorator and path must survive
